unarmored.description: No armor. You rely on your agility and luck.

padded.description: Quilted layers of cloth and batting. Basic protection. +1 to Initiative & Spell Resistance.

leather.description: Standard leather armor used by scouts and rogues. +2 to Initiative & +1 Spell Resistance.

leather_armor.description: Reinforced leather, offering basic protection for scouts.

studded_leather.description: Made from tough but flexible leather, and reinforced with close-set rivets. +3 to Initiative & +2 Spell Resistance.

dark_leather.description: Studded leather, dyed black for stealth. +4 to Initiative, +2 Spell Resistance & +1 Spell Save.

assassin_leather.description: Leather made from a unique beast, boasting exceptional stealth and protection. +5 to Initiative, +3 Spell Resistance & +2 Spell Save.

hide_armor.description: Rugged armor made from the hides of wild beasts. +1 Spell Resistance.

chain_shirt.description: Interlocking metal rings, worn between layers of clothing or leather. +1 Damage Resistance.

Studded_hide_armor.name: Studded Hide Armor
Studded_hide_armor.description: Dual layered hide armor held together with metal rivets. +2 Spell Resistance.

breastplate.description: A fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather. +1 Damage Resistance & +1 Spell Resistance.

half_plate.description: Shaped metal plates that cover most of the wearer's body. +2 Damage Resistance & +2 Spell Resistance.

ring_mail.description: Leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it. +1 Damage Resistance.

chainmail.description: A complete suit of chain mail, providing excellent protection. +2 Damage Resistance.

splint.description: Narrow strips of metal riveted to a backing of leather. +3 Damage Resistance.

plate.description: Many shaped, interlocking metal plates cover the entire body. +4 Damage Resistance.

plate_armor.description: Exquisite metal plates, offering unmatched physical protection. +5 Damage Resistance.

novice_robe.description: A basic robe for apprentices. +2 Spell Resistance and MP.

adept_robe.description: A finely woven robe for experienced casters. +3 Spell Resistance and +4 MP.

archmage_robe.description: A powerful robe crackling with energy. +4 Spell Resistance and +6 MP.

monk_wraps.description: Simple linen wraps, befitting a monk. +2 to Initiative, Spell Resistance & Stamina.

ascendant_wraps.description: Intricatley woven warps, awarded to well-practiced monks. +3 to Initiative, Spell Resistance & +4 to Stamina.

grandmaster_wraps.description: Masterfully crafted wraps, reserved for the most skilled monks. +4 to Initiative, Spell Resistance & +8 to Stamina.

behir_scale.description: Scales harvested from a Behir, naturally resistant to magic. +2 Damage Resistance, +4 Spell Resistance.

bulette_plate.description: A heavy plate made from a Bulette's hide. +6 Damage Resistance.

dragon_hide.description: Armor crafted from the hide of a young dragon. +4 Damage Resistance, +4 Spell Resistance.

massive_shell.description: A massive, extremely heavy shell from a Dragon Turtle. +8 Damage Resistance.

remorhaz_carapace.description: The heated carapace of a Remorhaz. +5 Damage Resistance, +3 Spell Resistance.

troll_bone_armor.description: Armor reinforced with troll bones. It seems to pulse with vitality. +30 Max HP.
